title: Massachusetts Civil Service Commission (CSC) — Agency Landing Page
description: Scrape of the MA Civil Service Commission landing page. The CSC is an independent appellate tribunal that hears civil-service-covered state/municipal employee appeals under M.G.L. c.31 — discipline, layoff, bypass, examination, and classification — and investigates alleged civil-service-law violations. Provides online appeal filing, hearing dockets, searchable decisions, and a self-represented-individuals guide. The forum for civil-service-covered DDS employees contesting adverse actions.
notes: No filing deadline on this landing page; c.31 appeal deadlines vary by type (often 10 days from notice for disciplinary appeals). Online filing at ara.anf.mass.gov. File ~7.9 KB.
